CustomField.description: Allows a personal message to be added to the header of the TFN Declaration form. This is typically used to guide employees, especially when the personal details section is read-only and they need to contact someone to request a change.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Allows a personal message to be added to the header of the TFN Declaration form. This is typically used to guide employees, especially when the personal details section is read-only and they need to contact someone to request a change.
CustomField.label: TFN Message
